Notes: Delete an RRset type that does not exist at an existing owner name. The prerequisite makes the owner existence explicit; the zone should remain unchanged regardless of reply code.

Steps.Description: Attempt to delete the non-existent MX RRset at an owner name that is known to exist.

Steps.Name: keep.campus.edu.
Steps.Description: Observe that the MX RRset remains absent after the UPDATE, regardless of whether the server replied NOERROR, NXRRSET, or SERVFAIL.
